title: Schedule Mayuri stakeholder meetings
description:
Original: "[Justs & Justus Check-In]: Schedule stakeholder meetings with Mayuri for early May"

From Justs & Justus Check-In (Apr 23). Initiate scheduling of stakeholder meetings with Mayuri for early May to communicate the transition of forecasting and finance responsibilities.

title: Share tax audit template
description:
Original: "[Justs & Justus Check-In]: Share corporate income tax audit template with Justus & Mayuri"

From Justs & Justus Check-In (Apr 23). Share the corporate income tax audit template and related data (2024 template for identifying top 5 corporate clients in Canada sold in 2025) with Justus Kaiser and Mayuri to support auditor request.

title: Regenerate GitHub PAT "brain" — expires ~May 1
description: GitHub fine-grained PAT named "brain" (token ID 13040969) expires in ~3 days (email sent Apr 24 saying 7 days). This token is critical for brain Git sync operations. Regenerate at: github.com/settings/personal-access-tokens/13040969/regenerate — then update any CI/CD or agent configs that reference it.

title: AWS unpaid invoice $10.08 — account suspension risk
description: AWS invoice 2367147281 ($10.08, originally due 2025-11-01) remains unpaid. Email from Apr 20 warned they'd charge the default card in 2 days — that window has passed. Either it charged successfully or the account (personal AWS 487042309472) may be at risk of suspension. Check billing console to confirm status.

title: Add Justus+Mayuri to Merge1 meetings
description:
Original: "[Justs & Justus Check-In]: Add Justus & Mayuri to future Merge1 meetings"

From Justs & Justus Check-In (Apr 23). Include Justus Kaiser and Mayuri as invited participants in future Merge1 meetings to maintain involvement and support development.
